prompt: Write Bruno e2e tests for an OAuth2 authorization code flow. Endpoints: POST /oauth/authorize, POST /oauth/token, GET /oauth/userinfo, POST /oauth/revoke. Base URL http://localhost:8080. Client credentials from env vars CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET. Test the full lifecycle and error cases.

assertions.name: lifecycle-chaining
assertions.description: Uses bru.setVar and/or bru.setNextRequest to chain authorize->token->userinfo->revoke

assertions.name: authorize-tests
assertions.description: Tests for POST /oauth/authorize with assertions on code and state in response

assertions.name: token-exchange-tests
assertions.description: Tests for POST /oauth/token exchanging auth code for tokens

assertions.name: userinfo-tests
assertions.description: Tests for GET /oauth/userinfo using Bearer access_token

assertions.name: revoked-token-fails
assertions.description: Test verifying that using a revoked token returns 401

assertions.name: error-cases
assertions.description: At least one error case test (invalid client_id, expired code, etc.)

assertions.name: env-var-credentials
assertions.description: CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET loaded from environment variables, not hardcoded
